bulkEditingTipDescription: Learn how to safely bulk edit almost any product or variant on your store. Make sure your edits are correct with live previews, live progress, and a one-click undo.
editWithSpreadsheetDescription: You can update your products with a spreadsheet without having to reformat it to match Shopify's specifications. Update products based on SKU, handle, ID, and much more.
exportProductDataDescription: Export your product data to a spreadsheet in the Excel, CSV, Google Shopping, or Matrixify format. Set up repeating exports or exports to a public URL to syndicate your products.
metamatrixChangelogDescription: We're continuously updating the app to make it the fastest and safest way to update your product data. Stay up-to-date with the latest improvements by visiting our changelog.
pageSubtitle: Search for your products, then edit
searchPlaceholder: Search products by title, vendor, type...
privacyIntro: At MetaMatrix, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy outlines the types of personal information we collect and how we use, protect, and disclose that information.
section1Content: We may collect personal information, such as your name, email address, and payment details when you use our services.
section2Content: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, process payments, and communicate with you about your account and our services.
section3Content: We take the security of your personal information seriously and implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect it.
section4Content: We do not sell or rent your personal information. However, we may share data with trusted third‑party service providers to perform functions on our behalf.
section5Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal data at any time. Please contact us to make any changes to your information.
section6Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will post the new policy on this page and update the effective date.
suggestionPageSubtitle: Help us improve! Share your thoughts and suggestions.
suggestionIntroText: Your feedback is invaluable to us! Share your suggestions, ideas, or any issues you've encountered, and we'll do our best to improve the app experience.
suggestionSuccessBanner: Thank you for your feedback! We appreciate your input.
emailHelpText: We'll only use this to reach out for clarification.
watchDemoIntro: Watch a quick demo to explore the features.
findProductMatch: Let's Find Your Perfect Product Match
applyFilters: Apply filters to browse, edit, and manage your products with ease.
modifyPriceNote: This will modify price values for all selected products
sliderHint: Use the slider or enter a value manually
revertChangesNote: This will revert the changes at the specified time
selectDateRunEdit: Select the date to run the edit
selectTimeRunEdit: Select the time to run the edit
selectDateUndoEdit: Select the date to undo the edit
selectTimeUndoEdit: Select the time to undo the edit
generateSpreadsheets: Generate customized spreadsheets with your product data
fileNameHint: Enter a name for your export file (without extension)
exportGuideSteps: Create customized exports of your product data in just a few steps:
stepChooseFilename: Choose a filename for your export
stepSelectAttributes: Select the product attributes to include
csvFormat: CSV format for easy spreadsheet editing
includeDataNote: Include only the data you need
title: Title
freeversion_description: The Starter Plan is free and offers essential features with a cap of 10 products per action (edit, export, or import). You can have unlimited products in your store, but each action will only process up to 10 products at a time. This plan includes:
freeversion_feature_2: Edit as much as you want
freeversion_feature_3: Unlimited use in dev until launch
Basic_monthly_description: The Basic Plan supports unlimited products per action, ideal for stores with moderate editing needs. Features include
Advanced_monthly_description: This plan brings automation to enhance inventory management. It includes all Basic Plan features, plus
pro_monthly_description: Designed for complex inventory needs and multi‑user teams, the Professional Plan offers all Advanced Plan features with further enhancements:
subscription_cta_description: Select a plan that fits your needs and unlock premium features. Manage or verify your subscription with ease.
faqSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our subscription service
faq_subscriptions_answer: Our subscription plans are billed monthly through your Shopify account. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time.
faq_limits_question: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
faq_limits_answer: You'll be notified when you're approaching your limit. You can upgrade your plan at any time to increase your limits.
faq_cancel_question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq_cancel_answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the subscription management page. Your plan will remain active until the end of your billing period.
Contact_Support: Contact our support team for personalized assistance
confirmUndoMessage: Are you sure you want to undo the edit? This action will revert all products to their state before this edit was applied.
priceDecreaseMessage: Enter the percentage to decrease prices by, or use the slider below
removeTextToEndFromWord: Remove text from a word to the end
removeTextUpToWord: Remove text up to and including a word

spreadsheetImportSubtitle: Upload a CSV, review the mapping, and queue your product import safely.
spreadsheetIntroText: Upload your CSV file, review the detected columns, and confirm the import before products are queued for processing.
spreadsheetWarningFileType: The uploaded file must be a .csv file.
spreadsheetWarningProductId: The first column should contain the Product ID.
spreadsheetWarningVariantId: The second column should contain the Variant ID.
spreadsheetWarningEachRow: Each row must contain the correct Product ID and Variant ID.
spreadsheetWarningIncorrectIds: Incorrect IDs may update the wrong products.
spreadsheetUploadSectionText: Choose a CSV file to preview its rows and prepare your column mapping.
spreadsheetReadyText: Confirm the file and mapping before queuing the import.
spreadsheetPreviewSectionText: Review parsed rows and confirm each CSV column maps to the correct product field.
suggestionPageSubTitle: Tell us what could be better
feedbackMiniText: Tell us what you expected, what you experienced, and what would make the workflow better.
formHeaderText: We read submissions carefully and use them to improve the product experience.
suggestionPlaceholder: Describe your idea, improvement, or issue in a clear and concise way...
feedbackHint: The most useful feedback is specific, brief, and focused on one clear improvement.
syncHeroText: Refresh mirrored catalog data when you need targeting, previews, and exports to reflect the latest Shopify state.
syncGuidanceText: Start one sync at a time to avoid unnecessary queue pressure and keep the mirror state predictable.
syncRunningBanner: A sync is running in the background. Keep this page open to monitor status updates.
mirrorDetailsText: Product sync refreshes the mirrored catalog used for filtering, previews, exports, and edit planning.
syncRefreshHint: Run a refresh whenever catalog changes in Shopify need to appear in your app workspace before the next planned operation.
historyOverviewText: Review edit activity, export runs, and background work from one organized workspace.
historyFiltersText: Search recent activity, switch between history types, and export the current view.
historyEditActivityText: Review edit runs, inspect details, and undo completed changes from a cleaner workspace.
historyUndoDisabledSync: Undo is temporarily unavailable while product sync is in progress.
historyLiveStatusHint: Live statuses refresh automatically for active jobs.
historyLoadMoreHint: Load additional history without leaving the current view.
exportOverviewText: Track generated files, monitor progress, and download completed exports.
exportGeneratedText: Download completed files and review recent export activity.
exportEmptyText: Completed export files will appear here once a CSV has been generated.
exportFilteredProductsText: Use these results as the source for edits, previews, and exports.
filteredProductsEmptyText: Try removing a filter or broadening your search to find products again.
exportPageSubtitle: Download product and variant data for reporting or bulk editing
exportBuilderText: Configure the file, choose columns, and keep the current product scope intact.
exportNextStepOne: The export is created using the current filtered product set.
exportNextStepTwo: Your file appears in export history once generation completes.
exportNextStepThree: Completed files can be downloaded again from the history page.
exportSettingsText: Name the file and confirm the current product scope before generating a CSV.
fileNameHelpText: The file will be downloaded as a CSV.
exportFieldSelectionText: Choose the product, variant, and SEO columns to include in this export.
bulkEditSetupText: Choose a field, set the transformation, and review the exact preview before you run anything.
bulkEditPreviewSummaryText: The preview refreshes from your current filter set and uses the same targeting basis as the edit run.
bulkEditSyncBlockingMessage: Product sync is still running. Edit, schedule, and recurring actions are temporarily disabled until the mirror is ready.
recurringEditTimeHelpText: Choose the exact time this recurring edit should run.
recurringEditDayOfMonthHelpText: Edits scheduled on days 29–31 may skip shorter months.
dashboardOverviewDescription: Review activity, check store readiness, and jump back into the workflows merchants use most.
quickActionsDescription: Jump directly into the tasks merchants use most often.
productsDescription: Browse your catalog and start working on product data.
bulkEditDescription: Create and manage edits across products faster.
exportsDescription: Generate product exports for reporting or external workflows.
snippetStudioDescription: Open reusable product snippets and code utilities.
learnAndOptimizeDescription: Best practices, guidance, and product education for faster execution.
freeAccessMessage: You can keep using the app at no cost for the current access   window. If you need more time, we can extend it for you.
productSyncMessage: Your product mirror is updating in the background. You can   continue using the app and refresh the sync page for live   status.
undoQueuedDetail: Waiting to undo this edit safely.
productsReadyForBulkEditing: Your products are now ready for bulk editing in Metamatrix.
productTargetingDescription: Build filters, review counts, and launch edits or exports without leaving the admin flow.
filtersDescription: Search first, then add field-specific rules to narrow the target set.

pricingPageTitle: Choose the perfect plan for your business
pricingPageSubtitle: Start free and upgrade as you grow. All plans include our core features with no hidden fees.
PlansAndBillingHelpText: Everything you need to know about our plans and billing
faqAnswer1: Our subscription plans are billed monthly through your Shopify account. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. All charges appear directly on your Shopify invoice.
faqQuestion2: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
faqAnswer2: You'll receive notifications when you're approaching your limit. You can upgrade your plan at any time to increase your limits without losing any data or configurations.
faqQuestion3: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqAnswer3: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the subscription management page. Your plan will remain active until the end of your billing period, and you can continue using all features during that time.
faqAnswer4: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing, while downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
faqAnswer5: Absolutely. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We follow industry best practices and comply with Shopify\'s security requirements to keep your information safe.
SupportHelpChoosePlan: Our support team is here to help you choose the right plan
FreePlanActivationLine1: You are about to activate the Free plan.
FreePlanActivationLine2: This plan includes limited features. You can upgrade anytime.
Perfect for trying out our app: Perfect for trying out our app
